suggestions.title: Telemetry emission can fail the whole invocation
suggestions.resolution: Wrapped metric emission in try/except and log warning with event player_count_metric_emit_failed so telemetry failure does not fail successful execution.

suggestions.title: Acceptance criterion #3 only partially tested
suggestions.resolution: Added explicit test for non-validation failure (fetch_roster failure) asserting player_count_returned metric is not emitted.

suggestions.title: No automated verification for App Insights visibility timing
suggestions.resolution: Requires environment-backed integration validation against Azure Application Insights customMetrics ingestion latency; not feasible in local unit-test-only context.
